name: ALCopsDownloadAnalyzers
description: Download ALCops code analyzers for AL (Business Central) with automatic TFM detection
author: ALCops

inputs.name: detectUsing
inputs.label: Detect TFM Using
inputs.helpMarkDown: Input for TFM detection: a BC artifact URL, local compiler path, NuGet DevTools version/channel, or VS Marketplace version. Smart routing determines the detection source automatically. Use `detectFrom` to override.

inputs.name: detectFrom
inputs.label: Detection Source
inputs.helpMarkDown: Force a specific detection source, overriding the automatic routing of `detectUsing`

inputs.name: tfm
inputs.label: Target Framework
inputs.helpMarkDown: Explicit .NET target framework. Skips TFM detection entirely. Provide either `tfm` or `detectUsing`.

inputs.name: version
inputs.label: ALCops Version
inputs.helpMarkDown: Version to download: `latest`, `prerelease`, or a specific version (e.g., `1.2.3`)

inputs.name: outputPath
inputs.label: Output Path
inputs.helpMarkDown: Where to place extracted analyzer DLLs. Defaults to `$(Build.SourcesDirectory)/.alcops`

outputVariables.name: tfm
outputVariables.description: The detected or specified target framework moniker

outputVariables.name: outputDir
outputVariables.description: Full path to the directory containing the extracted analyzer DLLs

outputVariables.name: files
outputVariables.description: Semicolon-separated list of analyzer DLL paths
